evidence_direction_note: EXQ-233 NON-CONTRIBUTORY (2026-04-04): ablation not discriminative. Both SD012_ACTIVE (drive_weight=2.0) and SD012_ABLATED (drive_weight=0.0) produce near-identical z_goal_norm~0.0 in all seeds. A valid ablation requires the active arm to function -- both arms failing identically means benefit_exposure is near-zero upstream of drive_weight. Contradicts EXQ-189 (z_goal_norm=0.30 with drive_weight=2.0). Flagged for /diagnose-errors: SD-012 causal role cannot be evaluated from this result. Non-evidential for both SD-012 and MECH-112.
